title: selliguea subtaeniata
intro: Selliguea subtaeniata, also known as the Tawa plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea subtaeniata include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed for its medicinal properties.
